settings.caption: About Candles By Victoria
settings.heading: Handcrafted fragrance for the true enthusiast.
settings.text: Candles By Victoria creates premium scented candles and wax melts, defined by an expansive library of scent, bespoke customization, and a deeply personal handcrafted approach.

settings.heading: A Passion for Scent
settings.text:
What began as a quiet passion for scent blending has blossomed into a destination for those seeking more than mass-produced fragrance. We believe a scent should tell a story, evoke a memory, and transform a room.

Today, we pair artisan craftsmanship with modern convenience, helping you curate a fragrance ritual that feels unmistakably yours.

settings.caption: What Makes CBV Different
settings.title: Designed for true candle enthusiasts.
settings.text_1: From comforting gourmands to refined perfumery, our collections are meticulously curated for every mood and season.
settings.text_2: Take creative control. Our custom builder allows you to tailor a scent profile that reflects your exact desires.
settings.text_3: Poured with intention. Each candle and melt is produced with care, delivering a sensory experience you can see and feel.
settings.text_4: Built for true fragrance lovers who demand depth, complexity, and a signature touch in their home.

settings.caption: The Fragrance Library
settings.heading: Explore the Scent Library.
settings.text: Hundreds of scent possibilities await. Discover classics, seasonal highlights, and wildly creative blends.

settings.quote: “We believe home fragrance should be both beautiful and deeply personal. Every scent is poured to help you build rituals you look forward to, every single day.”
settings.author: The CBV Philosophy
